member.name: T:ipdfreely.Services.PdfCoordinateMapper
member.summary: Maps PDF user space (origin bottom-left, Y increasing upward) to MAUI-style overlay coordinates normalized to the page (origin top-left, X and Y as fractions of page width/height).

member.name: M:ipdfreely.Services.PdfCoordinateMapper.ToRelativeOverlay(UglyToad.PdfPig.Core.PdfRectangle,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Converts a PDF-axis-aligned rectangle into relative overlay metrics (top-left based).

member.name: M:ipdfreely.Services.PdfCoordinateMapper.AdjustPositionForProportionalSize(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Converts normalized overlay coordinates into pixel positions for a view that preserves the same aspect ratio as the reference page size (proportional scaling).

member.name: F:ipdfreely.Services.PdfOverlayExportService.SystemFontFiles
member.summary: Maps display font name → .ttf filename in the system Fonts directory.

member.name: M:ipdfreely.Services.PdfOverlayExportService.GetAvailableFonts
member.summary: Returns the list of font names available for user text overlays. Only includes fonts actually present on the system. "Open Sans" (embedded) is always first.

member.name: M:ipdfreely.Services.PdfOverlayExportService.BuildPdfWithPreservedContent(System.Byte[],System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{ipdfreely.Services.PageTextOverlay}},ipdfreely.Services.ILoggingService)
member.summary: Opens the original PDF and draws text overlays directly on top of existing pages. Preserves all original content (vector graphics, selectable text, images). For field edits, a white rectangle is drawn first to cover the original value.

member.name: M:ipdfreely.Services.PdfOverlayExportService.BuildPdfFromRastersAndOverlays(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{ipdfreely.Services.RasterFormDraw},System.Double,ipdfreely.Services.ILoggingService)
member.summary: Builds a new PDF from full-page PNG rasters and optional overlay text per page. Uses the original page dimensions so that exported text size and position match the on-screen overlay exactly when viewed at the same page scale. Overlay positions use top-left normalized coordinates (0–1).

member.name: T:ipdfreely.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.
